notes: Solid, complete Breakout implementation with all core mechanics working—title/ready/playing/paused/game-over/victory states, ball physics, brick collision, lives, score, high score, particles, and trail—minor visual polish (no rounded paddle/ball, no brick gap variation) keeps it from a perfect score.
An exceptionally well-crafted Breakout clone with flawless collision detection, juicy particle effects, smooth delta-time movement, and a complete game loop.

A solid and mostly complete Breakout build with good controls and no obvious runtime bugs, but it lacks polish in collision edge cases and omits some classic behaviors/features that prevent a top score.
